title: feat(store): semantic search via optional local embeddings
context:
Opt-in semantic recall over Hunch records using local embeddings, with
@huggingface/transformers as an OPTIONAL peer dep so the base install
stays lean. Vectors live in the derived SQLite index and are reconciled
by content hash on every `hunch index`, so they never drift from the
JSON source of truth.

- store/embedder: local embedding runtime (lazy-loaded; degrades to
  keyword-only when the optional dep is absent)
- store/schema + hunchStore: vector storage + hybrid keyword/semantic
  recall
decision: Introduced src/cli, src/core, src/mcp, src/store, test/embed.test.ts: added Embedder, installedPackage, TransformersEmbedder, p, StubEmbedder, selectEmbedder, add, numEnv; changed shortHash; new dep(s): node:module, node:test, node:assert/strict; 2 new file(s).
